name: /plugin-update re-runs the rule-tester equivalent tests on the updated plugin code
command:
mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/example .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example && printf 'name: example
rules:
  - id: foo
    detector: rubric/detectors/foo.sh
' > stub-clones/acme/example/plugin.yaml && printf 'plugin_id: example
source_repo: acme/example
' > .claude-tdd-pro/plugins/registered/example/source.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-update.sh" example --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub pass --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'rule_tester_invoked=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
